actions.intent: Start on the left rescue-side group, breaking the first ice route tile and showing that ice is future value.
Continue investing in the upper ice lane instead of chasing cleaner side clears.
Use the revealed A support to break the upper-right crate and begin opening the puppy pocket.
Cycle D residue safely and keep the route lane from becoming a dock problem.
Break the right-side ice on the rescue lane so its hidden value can fall into play.
Cash the central F group to reveal the last lower route material and preserve tempo.
Clear the upper C group to make visible target progress while accepting temporary dock pressure.
Use the C route cluster to clear dock pressure and keep the final rescue path controlled.
Clear D residue before the water warning becomes dangerous.
Open the final puppy side and complete the ice-investment rescue payoff.

notes: Designer-approved intended path for L04 ice introduction; proves early ice investment pays off before water becomes lethal.
